modules.note: packages/core-economics — Phase 1 economics kernel with decimal.js, period normalization, currency conversion via ForexRateProvider, formula registry, vitest tests
Phase 3 — plugin registration contract; FeatureRegistry with Kahn topological sort, diamond-dep + circular-dep detection, capability-based discovery; 27 vitest tests
packages/schemas/model-catalog/index.ts delivered in PR #118 — ModelPricingReference, APPROVED_BENCHMARKS, PricingSourceType, PricingUnit
packages/integrations/models-pricing delivered in PR #118 — duksh-models-adapter with snapshot versioning, transform, and fixture tests
Phase 3 — MCP tool registry + 3 tools (economics.estimate.cost, economics.period.normalize, health.score.query); closes Gap 5; 32 vitest tests

Phase 3 — framework-agnostic UI primitive layer; Intent/Scope/Mode taxonomy, PreferenceStore (StorageAdapter injectable), ThemeManager (light/dark/system toggle, CSS custom properties, no-FWOT), IntentScopeState (history stack, autoScope, deep-link serialization), LocalizationShell (en/fr/zh, {{var}} interpolation), KeyboardShortcutRegistry (WCAG focus-trap, contrast utilities), BufferedTelemetryEmitter (12-event schema); 75 vitest tests, zero DOM dependencies

Phase 3 — Vite + React browser runtime; CostEstimator (all 6 pricing units), HealthDashboard (signals + recommendations), ArchitectPanel (package graph + ADRs); now wired to ui-foundation: ThemeToggle (light/dark/system), IntentScopeBar (intent/scope/mode selectors with back + scope-hint), useUiFoundation hook bootstraps ThemeManager + PreferenceStore + LocalizationShell + IntentScopeState as module-level singletons
NormalizedCostRecord contract v1.0.0 — FOCUS-informed billing record type
Phase 2 — ChartPayload DTO contract, ADR-0001 D3-first policy, builders (period-cost, model-comparison, unresolvable), validators; 47 vitest tests
Phase 2 — deterministic health signal engine; 6 signal categories, weighted aggregate, worst-severity propagation; 22 vitest tests
Phase 2 — audience-aware recommendation engine; 17 declarative rules, 4 personas, critical→low sort; 31 vitest tests
Phase 2 — AI pricing unit dispatcher closing Gap 1; per_token/1k/1m, per_image (resolution+steps multipliers), per_request, per_second; 32 vitest tests

Phase 4 — shared cross-package boundary types (WorkspaceContext, IntentScopeSnapshot, EconomicsResultSummary, HealthSignalSummary, RecommendationSummary, TelemetryBase); no business logic; consumed by all packages as the contract boundary
Phase 5 scaffold — Fastify + @modelcontextprotocol/sdk transport around mcp-tooling; implementation deferred to Phase 5 after apps/web production wiring is complete
